calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
David Tillotson, Esq. for Plaintiff: Lisa Pingatore, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Jack Steffen as follows:
Principal of $87,7073.01
Costs granted, counsel to prepare declaration of costs, and to be submitted to court with proposed Judgment.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
